# FinanceCalc - Free Online Financial Calculators

> Free, easy-to-use financial calculators for mortgages, loans, investments, retirement, salary, and more. No registration required.

## Mortgage & Loans

- [House Affordability Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/house-affordability): Calculate the maximum home price based on income and debts
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/rent-vs-buy): Compare total cost of renting vs buying over time
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/mortgage): Monthly payments, total interest, and amortization schedules
- [Loan Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/loan): Estimate payments for any loan type with customizable terms
- [Auto Loan Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/auto-loan): Car payments including trade-in and down payment
- [Amortization Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/amortization): Detailed amortization schedules with payment breakdowns
- [Mortgage Payoff Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/mortgage-payoff): How extra payments shorten mortgage term
- [Refinance Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/refinance): Determine if refinancing saves money

## Investment & Savings

- [Retirement Calculator (FIRE)](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/retirement): When you can achieve financial independence
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/compound-interest): How money grows with compound interest
- [Investment Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/investment): Project investment growth with contributions
- [Savings Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/savings): Plan savings goals with monthly contributions
- [ROI Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/roi): Return on investment for any venture
- [CD Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/cd): Certificate of deposit earnings and yields
- [Inflation Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/inflation): Impact of inflation on purchasing power

## Salary & Income

- [Salary Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/salary): Convert between hourly, weekly, monthly, and annual pay
- [Hourly to Salary](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/hourly-to-salary): Convert hourly wages to annual salary
- [Pay Raise Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/pay-raise): Impact of a salary increase
- [Overtime Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/overtime): Overtime pay at 1.5x and 2x rates

## Other Tools

- [Currency Converter](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/currency-converter): Convert between major world currencies
- [Credit Card Payoff](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/credit-card-payoff): Credit card debt payoff strategy
- [Debt Payoff Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/debt-payoff): Debt payoff plan (snowball or avalanche method)
- [Net Worth Calculator](https://financecalculatoronline.pro/calculators/net-worth): Calculate total net worth from assets and liabilities

## Key Facts

- All calculators are free with no registration required
- Uses standard financial formulas reviewed for accuracy
- Results include detailed breakdowns and explanations
- Mobile-friendly responsive design
- Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel
